title: Reconstruct the argument from slide titles alone
guidance: Reward catching label-titles and logic gaps. Penalise missing the labels.

parts.label: Flags
parts.note: which titles fail the claim test

runner_input.instruction: From the titles only, rebuild the thesis and flag where the chain breaks.
runner_input.constraints: Reconstruct in <=5 lines. Flag each title that is a label, not a claim.

items: 3. The moat is institutional, not technical
5. AI is the upside: three levers above plan
6. Capability gates the size, not the existence, of the upside

rubric_notes: Titles 2 ('Industry overview') and 4 ('Competitive dynamics') are topic labels, not claims — they break the read-the-titles-alone test.
The reconstructable thesis: AI reshapes the category, the moat is institutional, AI is net upside, capability sizes it.
